scripts.setup: npm --prefix apps/shopify-app ci && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api ci
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/shopify-app run build && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run prisma:generate && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/shopify-app run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test:shopify-app && npm run test:delivery-api
